center.name: Sand forest
center.summary: Sand forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括灰腿穴䳍、Brown-banded puffbird、Rusty-backed antwren等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its occurs in sand forests, riverine woodland, scrubs, evergreen forests, and sometimes gardens and reedbeds, but usually not in damp areas. In the 1950s, deforestation near Hluhluwe and False Bay destroyed some of its habitat,{{cite encyclopedia|author=T

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits the interior and edges of rainforest and transitional forest, stunted forest on white-sand and other nutrient-poor soils, and the edges of terra firme forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is believed to be resident in all parts of its range. The rusty-backed antwren inhabits a variety of semi-open to open landscapes such as cerrado, campos with scattered trees, white sand forest, and scrublands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: As a poor soil specialist, the grey-legged tinamous are commonly found in Amazonian white-sand forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Its preferred habitat is stunted forests, forest edges and second growth on sandy soils in the upper Río Negro basin, as well as in lighter savannah woodland. Two recent surveys of birds Amazon basin found the Azure-naped jay is endemic to areas of white sand forest, and is not found in nearby areas of nearby terra firme forests, seasonally flooded forests and Amazonian savannas.{{cite journal |last1=Borges |first1=Sérgio Henrique |last2=Cornelius |first2=Cintia |last3=Ribas |first3=Camila |last4=Almeida |first4=Ricardo |last5=Guilherme |first5=Edson |last6=Aleixo |first6=Alexandre |last7=Dantas |first7=Sidnei |last8=Santos |first8=Marcos Pérsio Dos |last9=Moreira |first9=Marcelo |title=What is the avifauna of Amazonian white-sand vegetation?
